title: Limited continuing tutorship; authority; privileges and duties of tutor and undertutor
doc_html:
Art. 358.1. Limited continuing tutorship; authority; privileges and duties of tutor and undertutor

            The granting of a decree of limited continuing tutorship shall confer upon the tutor and undertutor only the authority, privileges, and responsibilities required to protect the interest of the person under limited continuing tutorship.

            Acts 2024, No. 123, §1.
doc_text:

undertutor

and undertutor only the authority, privileges, and responsibilities required to protect the
interest of the person under limited continuing tutorship.
Acts 2024, No. 123, §1.
